# Fix bugs

Analyze the selected code and fix any bugs or issues found.

## Process
1. Identify the bug or issue
2. Explain why it's a problem
3. Provide the corrected code
4. Explain the fix

## Common issues to check
- Null reference exceptions
- Off-by-one errors
- Resource leaks (missing disposal)
- Race conditions in async code
- Incorrect boundary conditions
- Logic errors

## Context
{{{ selection }}}

Apply fixes directly to the code while maintaining existing style conventions.
